steps.title: Find the slope of line h
steps.content:
Rewrite line $h$ in slope-intercept form.
$$\frac{1}{4}x+\frac{1}{9}y-72=0$$
$$\frac{1}{9}y=-\frac{1}{4}x+72$$
$$y=-\frac{9}{4}x+648$$
So line $h$ has slope $-\frac{9}{4}$.

steps.title: Use perpendicular slopes
steps.content:
Perpendicular slopes are negative reciprocals. The negative reciprocal of $-\frac{9}{4}$ is
$$\frac{4}{9}$$
The answer is D.
